Exercises Pricing Download

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 2026

Not a medical device

Lucid is not a medical device. It is not a clinical tool. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. The exercises are designed for general cognitive engagement and should not be used to diagnose or treat any medical condition. If you have concerns about cognitive health, consult a licensed healthcare professional.

Using the app

Lucid is available on the App Store for iOS. By downloading and using the app, you agree to these terms. You must be 13 or older to use the app.

You agree not to reverse-engineer, modify, or distribute the app or its content. You agree not to use the app in any way that violates applicable laws.

Subscriptions

Lucid offers weekly ($2.99/week) and annual ($59.99/year) subscriptions through Apple's App Store. Subscriptions automatically renew unless you cancel at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

To cancel: go to iOS Settings → [Your Name] → Subscriptions → Lucid → Cancel Subscription.

Prices may change. You'll be notified before any price change takes effect. Apple handles all payments — we don't store payment information.

Weekly subscriptions include a 7-day free trial for new subscribers. The trial auto-converts to a paid subscription unless cancelled before it ends.

Your content

Some exercises prompt you to write responses (creative prompts, open-ended questions). You retain ownership of what you write. By using these features, you grant Creayo LLC a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use your responses to improve Lucid's exercise quality and training data. Responses are never published publicly or associated with your identity.

If you don't want your responses used this way, avoid the creative writing card types or contact us to opt out.

Warranty and liability

Lucid is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We don't guarantee that the app will improve your cognitive performance. Results vary. We're not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from use of the app.

Changes to these terms

We may update these terms. We'll notify you of significant changes through the app. Continued use after changes means you accept the new terms.

Contact

Legal questions: legal@lucidapp.co

Creayo LLC · Indianapolis, IN
